latin: Tranquillitas nunc! tranquillitas nunc! pater eius haec verba clamabat quotiens iratus erat. sed quo magis clamabat, eo minus tranquillus fiebat.

questions.prompt: What does the father shout when angry?
What ironic effect does the shouting have?
questions.target: He becomes less calm the more he shouts
choices: He becomes less calm the more he shouts

translation: Serenity now! Serenity now! His father shouted these words whenever he was angry. But the more he shouted, the less calm he became.
